title: First they came for our nut,
content:
First they came for our nut,
& in the end, they'd eventually come for our nuts-no where along the line,
Not when their eros guiltted our agape our philia to flee, or as assumed of an eventual course the last strongholds of the social club invaded armsless, then naturally, arms replenished parallel to the ails refilled in perpetuity on and washed down

to build to sit beside
Quickly after the factories,
Then they came for the driver's seat,
context: From document: First they came for our nut,
